headline: House passes defense and State Department funding as Senate moves toward historic Medicare vote!

senate.lastSessionSummary: The Senate passed four resolutions on July 15, including a measure opposing executive clemency for Samuel Bankman-Fried, memorials for the Highland Park shooting anniversary and the 2016 West Virginia floods, and a celebration of the 2026 FIFA World Cup hosted in North America. The chamber also confirmed Judge Jeffrey T. Kuntz to the Southern District of Florida by a 51-46 vote.

onTheFloor.title: Rivers, harbors, water resources conservation and development improvements

house.lastSessionSummary: The House passed H.R. 8595, the National Security, Department of State, and Related Programs Appropriations Act for 2027, by a vote of 217-209 on July 15. The chamber approved multiple amendments addressing anti-trafficking efforts, State Department oversight, and support for Taiwan while rejecting amendments to eliminate funding for the Fulbright Program and restrict aid to Israel and Jordan.
